description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 4 hrs 16 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 1 hr 2 mins. His coding was mainly in Java (52%), with additional time in Other (27%) and Markdown (19%). The activity data does not list any public GitHub repos, commits, or pull requests this week.
